gauge.name: Cohansey River at Seeley

impacts.statement: Beals Mill Road and West Deerfield Road in Upper Deerfield Township are subject to flooding and closures.
Flooding expands on County Route 704 (Silver Lake Road).
County Route 704 (Silver Lake Road) in Upper Deerfield Township floods and is subject to closure.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
